sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39586" key="e)pikata/dusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικατά-δῠσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39586.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">setting of a star just after sunrise</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">after sunset</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.4</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:50:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.12</biblScope></bibl>, etc. </sense><sense n="II" id="n39586.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense">. Astrol., name of eighth <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τόπος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.</author> </bibl> Astr. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).117.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
